name: CNBX Pharmaceuticals Inc.
summary: CNBX Pharmaceuticals Inc. is a clinical-stage company based in Bethesda, Maryland, focused on the discovery, development, and commercialization of novel cannabinoid-based products for cancer treatment. Its lead product, Cannabics SR, is an oral sustained-release capsule for cancer anorexia cachexia syndrome (CACS). Its second candidate, RCC-33, is a first-in-class anti-neoplastic drug for colorectal cancer. R&D is conducted in a government-licensed lab in Israel through its wholly owned subsidiary G.R.I.N Ultra Ltd.

products.name: Cannabics SR
products.description: Sustained-release oral capsule containing standardized cannabinoids for treatment of cancer anorexia cachexia syndrome (CACS) in advanced cancer patients.

products.name: RCC-33
products.description: First-in-class anti-neoplastic drug candidate for colorectal cancer, targeting tumor cell activity as standalone neoadjuvant or adjuvant therapy.

partnerships.description: Delaware corporation and largest shareholder; transferred institutional R&D knowledge in molecular biology, cancer, and pharmacology in exchange for 18,239,594 shares and $150,000.
Conducted peer-reviewed pilot clinical study of Cannabics SR for CACS under Dr. Gil Bar-Sela, Division of Oncology, Haifa, Israel.
